inputs.text: Main thakawat mehsoos kar rahi hoon, bukhar hai aur sir dard hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Low-grade fever and malaise are common in viral fever

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Headache and fatigue can be symptoms of gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Although possible, typhoid is less likely without other specific symptoms

inputs.text: Mere bukhar roz badh raha hai, pet dard ho raha hai aur kabz hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Step-wise fever and constipation are indicative of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Abdominal pain and constipation can be seen in gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely due to the presence of abdominal symptoms

inputs.text: Ab mujhe tez bukhar hai, kabz ke baad dast ho gaya hai aur bohot kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Severe fever, diarrhea after constipation, and severe weakness are cardinal signs of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Diarrhea can be seen in gastroenteritis, but the pattern is less typical

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Unlikely due to the specific gastrointestinal symptoms

inputs.text: Main bohot thakawat mehsoos kar rahi hoon, bukhar abhi tak hai aur pet dard bahut badh gaya hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Prolonged high fever, severe abdominal pain, and risk of intestinal perforation confirm typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the prolonged and severe nature of symptoms

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the specific and severe gastrointestinal symptoms
